meta.question: In this model which task comes between 'Musterrohstoff oder bereits existentes Material  mit ähnlichen Informationen erfragen' and 'Produktstart, Eigenschaften, Spezifikationen, Zeichnung erfragen'? (Model ID: 3d0f07f9b84c4e31bbca562f472c8885)

request.query:
prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?task ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?task a bboExt:ChoreographyTask .
  ?task bbo:name ?name .
  ?task a ?type .
  ?task tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?defs a bboExt:Definitions .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model bbo:id "3d0f07f9b84c4e31bbca562f472c8885" .
}
LIMIT 50

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model ?name WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:name ?name .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?model), "3d0f07f9b84c4e31bbca562f472c8885") || CONTAINS(STR(?name), "3d0f07f9b84c4e31bbca562f472c8885"))
}
LIMIT 10

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?task ?name ?choreo WHERE {
  ?task a bboExt:ChoreographyTask .
  ?task bbo:name ?name .
  ?task tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Musterrohstoff")))
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?task ?name ?choreo WHERE {
  ?task a bboExt:ChoreographyTask .
  ?task bbo:name ?name .
  ?task tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("Produktstart")))
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?task1 ?name1 ?task2 ?name2 ?choreo WHERE {
  ?task1 a bboExt:ChoreographyTask .
  ?task1 bbo:name ?name1 .
  ?task1 tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  ?task2 a bboExt:ChoreographyTask .
  ?task2 bbo:name ?name2 .
  ?task2 tai:belongsTo ?choreo .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name1)), LCASE("Musterrohstoff")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name2)), LCASE("Produktstart")))
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>
prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?edge ?source ?target ?sourceName ?targetName WHERE {
  ?edge a bbo:SequenceFlow .
  ?edge bbo:has_sourceRef ?source .
  ?edge bbo:has_targetRef ?target .
  ?source bbo:name ?sourceName .
  ?target bbo:name ?targetName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?sourceName)), LCASE("Musterrohstoff")))
}
LIMIT 25

prefix bbo: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bbo#>
prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>
prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

  ?edge a bbo:SequenceFlow .
  ?edge bbo:has_sourceRef <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/kg/process/qualityInspection/sid-54E14248-102D-4467-B780-49F3F704E555> .
  ?edge bbo:has_targetRef ?target .

}

prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?model ?name ?choreo ?choreoName WHERE {
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  ?model bbo:id ?mid .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?mid), "3d0f07f9b84c4e31bbca562f472c8885"))
  ?model bbo:name ?name .
  ?model tai:belongsTo ?org .
  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?defs a bboExt:Definitions .
  ?choreo tai:belongsTo ?defs .
  ?choreo a bboExt:Choreography .
  OPTIONAL { ?choreo bbo:name ?choreoName . }
}

prefix bboExt: <http://www.onto-bpo.eu/ontologies/bboExtension#>

prefix tai: <https://www.teamingai-project.eu/>

  ?choreo bbo:name ?name .

  ?defs tai:belongsTo ?model .
  ?model a bboExt:Model .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(STR(?model), "sid_3772a4c8_337f_4a64_a2fc_de2aebea6f5b"))
}
LIMIT 10

SELECT ?sourceName ?targetName WHERE {
  ?edge a bbo:SequenceFlow .
  ?edge bbo:has_sourceRef ?source .
  ?edge bbo:has_targetRef ?target .
  ?source bbo:name ?sourceName .
  ?target bbo:name ?targetName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?sourceName)), LCASE("Musterrohstoff")))
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?targetName)), LCASE("Material")))
}
